title: AI Prompt Engineering Matrix
description: Design a comprehensive matrix of evaluation prompts for our internal LLM tool to test reasoning capabilities on edge cases. Ensure prompts are categorized defensively.

title: Frontend Performance Audit
description: Audit the primary dashboard using Chrome Lighthouse. Identify rendering bottlenecks and provide a technical spec doc for code-splitting current Webpack chunks.
feedback: Exceptional analysis! The recommended dynamic imports lowered our TTFB massively.

title: GraphQL Schema Migration
description: Migrate the legacy REST endpoints for the 'User Management' module into a unified GraphQL schema. Includes writing necessary resolvers and testing Apollo Server integrations.

title: Design System Tokens Sync
description: Map the new 'Liquid Glass' Figma design tokens into the project's tailwind.config.js and ensure all existing semantic colors are replaced accurately.
